name: figrecipe_app
label: Figrecipe
subtitle: Interactive figure editor for publication-ready matplotlib plots
about: Create, edit, and compose publication-ready figures with an interactive visual editor. Supports drag-and-drop layout, statistical annotations, style presets, and multi-panel composition.
description: Figrecipe is a visual figure editor built on matplotlib. It provides an interactive canvas for creating and editing publication-ready scientific figures. Features include drag-and-drop panel layout, statistical bracket annotations, theme/style management, data table integration, and multi-format export (PNG, SVG, PDF).
author: ywatanabe
capabilities: Export to PNG, SVG, PDF formats
